summary: Iteration 3 scoped: Tracking Completo + SOS + Maintenance Reminders. 8 user stories, 12 tasks across frontend (7), backend (4), qa (1), devops (1). Story 3.0 (Mapbox migration) is an absolute blocker for all other stories. Date-based maintenance reminders only (km-based deferred). Home Dashboard SOAT badge included (moved from iter-2). FCM infrastructure from iter-2 reused for SOS multicast and reminder push notifications. GeoJSON LineString confirmed as route format (over encoded polyline). SOS send-only in v1 (cancel deferred post-MVP). Background GPS requires physical device testing on both Android and iOS.

qualityGates.gate: All 8 user stories have testable acceptance criteria
At least one QA task (agent: qa) included — T-3-11
All new task statuses are valid (backlog/in_progress/done/cancelled)
Story 3.0 blocker explicitly documented with enforcement in all agent sections
po_plan and phase_complete events appended to workflow/state.json
